searchText: insight companion project idea project idea for building a simple node.js and express website that acts as a personalized ai learning companion, helping users ask questions, check understanding, discover knowledge gaps, receive follow-up suggestions, and store learning history. n/a idea reference project insight-companion ai-learning nodejs express personalization knowledge-gap hackday project-idea
